text:
22 PRs merged this week. mostly we taught the servers how to sing and stopped charging for things.

the big ones:
- The Great Audio Upgrade: Stable Audio 3 and ElevenLabs SFX/Music are live. make some noise.
- Quests & Pollen: subscription tiers are officially out. complete quests, earn Pollen, fund your API habits.
- Mercury 2 & Multimodal: unblocked and ready for your text/image/audio pipelines.
- Docs: BYOP (Bring Your Own Provider) is fully documented, legacy tier copy is scrubbed.

code is open. go build something weird. link in bio. 🐝💻

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #stableaudio #elevenlabs #generativeai #buildinpublic #api
